Hearing On Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James R. Patterson, Esq., from Patterson Law Group, 619-756-6993, for plaintiff Robin Nelson
Gene J. Stonebarger, Esq., from Stonebarger Law, 916-235-7140 for the Class
Diane L. Webb, Esq., form Morgan Lewis Counselors at Law, 415-442-1353, for defendant Destination Maternity Corporation

Disclosure made by Judge Miller about working with Ms. Webb before she became a Judge, and that she does not view this as basis for her recusal. No objections were made.
Hearing held on Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement, discussed and granted. Parties to provide a revised order with a copy of the settlement agreement to Department 302. Judge: Marla Miller, Court Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR #11918
